description: Core language builtins registered by mta_init_builtins(). Available on all platforms that ship mt-actions 1.1.0+.

functions.name: eq
functions.description: Returns true if two values are equal.

functions.name: neq
functions.description: Returns true if two values are not equal.

functions.name: gt
functions.description: Returns true if the first value is greater than the second.

functions.name: lt
functions.description: Returns true if the first value is less than the second.

functions.name: gte
functions.description: Returns true if the first value is greater than or equal to the second.

functions.name: lte
functions.description: Returns true if the first value is less than or equal to the second.

functions.name: set
functions.description: Assigns one or more variables. Full form: {var, value}. Shorthand: {key: val, ...}.

functions.name: add
functions.description: Returns the sum of two values.

functions.name: sub
functions.description: Returns the difference of two values.

functions.name: mul
functions.description: Returns the product of two values.

functions.name: div
functions.description: Returns the quotient of two values.

functions.name: mod
functions.description: Returns the remainder of two values.

functions.name: inc
functions.description: Increments a numeric variable by 1.

functions.name: dec
functions.description: Decrements a numeric variable by 1.

functions.name: strcmp
functions.description: Compares two strings; returns 0 if equal, negative/positive otherwise.

functions.name: strlen
functions.description: Returns the length of a string.

functions.name: charat
functions.description: Returns the character at a given index in a string.

functions.name: concat
functions.description: Concatenates two or more strings.

functions.name: chr
functions.description: Returns the character for a given ASCII code.

functions.name: toString
functions.description: Converts a value to its string representation.

functions.name: round
functions.description: Rounds a floating-point value to the nearest integer.

functions.name: getbyte
functions.description: Reads a byte at a given index from a byte array.

functions.name: setbyte
functions.description: Writes a byte at a given index in a byte array.
